criteria.label: Current major depressive episode
criteria.proxyNote: Approximated from claim recency + a treatment change within the lookback window.

criteria.label: Age 18 to upper limit
criteria.proxyNote: Reduction computed from the real RWD age histogram.

criteria.label: Moderate-to-severe depression (MADRS ≥ 20)
criteria.proxyNote: No MADRS in claims. Approximated from treatment intensity, polypharmacy, recent hospitalization, and ECT.

criteria.label: Substance use disorder
criteria.proxyNote: Claims under-capture SUD. Approximated from coded diagnoses + MAT prescriptions.

criteria.label: Recent suicidality / self-harm
criteria.proxyNote: Self-harm / ideation ICD codes + ER encounters. Understates true rate.
